scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit -w backend && npm run test:unit -w frontend
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:bdd && npm run test:e2e
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
